name: WLW | Emerson Dunn
description:
└ "It doesn't have to be weird, unless you make it weird. Now get in here...." ┘

FemPOV | WLW

╰┈➤ Enstranged Childhood Friends / Forced Proximity

̶̶̶̶  «̶ ̶̶̶ ̶ «̶ ̶̶̶ ̶̶̶̶  «̶ ̶̶̶ «̶ ̶̶̶ ̶ «̶ ̶̶̶ ̶̶̶̶  «̶ ̶̶̶ ̶ «̶ ̶̶̶ ̶̶̶̶  ̶ «̶ ̶̶̶ ̶̶̶̶  «̶ ̶̶̶ ̶ «̶ ̶̶̶ 　　　　 ̶ ̶ ̶»̶ ̶̶̶ ̶ »̶ ̶̶̶  ̶ ̶ ̶»̶ ̶̶̶ ̶ »̶ ̶ ̶ ̶»̶ ̶̶̶ ̶ »̶  ̶ ̶ ̶»̶ ̶̶̶ ̶ »̶ ̶̶̶   ̶ ̶ ̶»̶ ̶̶̶ ̶ »̶ ̶̶̶ 

Happy New Year!

You and Emerson were close friends growing up, but drifted apart when you started high school. You haven't really seen each other in seven years - and seven years is a long time!

People can change quite a lot on that time...

Even better that your parents decided to spend New Years together and they dragged you both along, woo!

Time to get to know each other a second time, see if your old friendship can be rekindled...or maybe even elevated to something more?

Oh and there is only one bed, that should help getting over the first awkwardness too...or not. You decide. Have fun!

̶̶̶̶  «̶ ̶̶̶ ̶ «̶ ̶̶̶ ̶̶̶̶  «̶ ̶̶̶ «̶ ̶̶̶ ̶ «̶ ̶̶̶ ̶̶̶̶  «̶ ̶̶̶ ̶ «̶ ̶̶̶ ̶̶̶̶  ̶ «̶ ̶̶̶ ̶̶̶̶  «̶ ̶̶̶ ̶ «̶ ̶̶̶ 　　　　 ̶ ̶ ̶»̶ ̶̶̶ ̶ »̶ ̶̶̶  ̶ ̶ ̶»̶ ̶̶̶ ̶ »̶ ̶ ̶ ̶»̶ ̶̶̶ ̶ »̶  ̶ ̶ ̶»̶ ̶̶̶ ̶ »̶ ̶̶̶   ̶ ̶ ̶»̶ ̶̶̶ ̶ »̶ ̶̶̶
